* еИЧ`Age`гБЂеЯЇгБ•гБДгБ¶гАБ12ж≠≥жЬ™жЇАгБ™гВЙ`Child`гАБ12ж≠≥дї•дЄК60ж≠≥жЬ™жЇАгБѓ`Adult`гАБ60ж≠≥дї•дЄКгБѓ`Senior`гБ®гБЩгВЛ
  * еИЧеРНгВТ`AgeCategory`гБ®гБЩгВЛ
  * AgeгБМnullгБ™гВЙnullгБЂгБЩгВЛгБУгБ®
дї•дЄЛгБЃгВ≥гГЉгГЙгВТеЃМжИРгБЧгАБеЃМжИРгБЧгБЯгВ≥гГЉгГЙеЕ®дљУгБЃгБњгВТеЫЮз≠ФгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБДгАВ

fields.answer_code:
import polars as pl
_file = "data/titanic_train.csv"
df_titanic = pl.read_csv(_file)
ans = df_titanic.with_columns(
    AgeCategory=pl.when(pl.col("Age") < 12)
    .then(pl.lit("Child"))
    .when(pl.col("Age") < 60)
    .then(pl.lit("Adult"))
    .when(pl.col("Age") >= 60)
    .then(pl.lit("Senior"))
    .otherwise(None)
)
print(ans)

дї•дЄЛгБЃгВ≥гГЉгГЙгВТеЃМжИРгБЧгАБеЃМжИРгБЧгБЯгВ≥гГЉгГЙеЕ®дљУгБЃгБњгВТеЫЮз≠ФгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБДгАВ

import polars as pl
_file = "data/NYC_Central_Park_weather_1869-2022.csv"
df_weather = pl.read_csv(_file).with_columns(pl.col("DATE").str.to_date())
ans = df_weather.group_by_dynamic(

    every="3mo",
    period="3mo",  # гВ¶гВ£гГ≥гГЙгВ¶гБЃжЬЯйЦУ(зЬБзХ•еПѓ)
    closed="left",  # гВ¶гВ£гГ≥гГЙгВ¶гБЃйЦЛеІЛзВєгВТеРЂгВА(зЬБзХ•еПѓ)
).agg(TotalPRCP=pl.col("PRCP").sum())
print(ans)

* 1еИЧзЫЃгБ®2еИЧзЫЃгБѓгАБеИЧ`Station`гБ®еИЧ`DATE`гБ®гБЩгВЛ
* еЬ∞зВє(Station)гБФгБ®гАБгБЛгБ§10еєігБФгБ®гБЂеє≥еЭЗжЬАйЂШж∞ЧжЄ©пЉИTMAXгБЃеє≥еЭЗпЉЙгВТи®ИзЃЧгБЩгВЛ
  * 3еИЧзЫЃгБЃеИЧеРНгВТ`AvgTMAX/decade`гБ®гБЩгВЛ
дї•дЄЛгБЃгВ≥гГЉгГЙгВТеЃМжИРгБЧгАБеЃМжИРгБЧгБЯгВ≥гГЉгГЙеЕ®дљУгБЃгБњгВТеЫЮз≠ФгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБДгАВ
```python
import polars as pl
_file = "data/NYC_Central_Park_weather_1869-2022.csv"
df_weather = pl.read_csv(_file).with_columns(pl.col("DATE").str.to_date())
# гГАгГЯгГЉгБЃи¶≥жЄђеЬ∞зВєеИЧгВТињљеК†
_df = df_weather.with_columns(
    Station=pl.when(pl.col("DATE").dt.year() < 1950)
    .then(pl.lit("StationA"))
    .otherwise(pl.lit("StationB"))
)
```
fields.answer_code:
import polars as pl
_file = "data/NYC_Central_Park_weather_1869-2022.csv"
df_weather = pl.read_csv(_file).with_columns(pl.col("DATE").str.to_date())
# гГАгГЯгГЉгБЃи¶≥жЄђеЬ∞зВєеИЧгВТињљеК†
_df = df_weather.with_columns(
    Station=pl.when(pl.col("DATE").dt.year() < 1950)
    .then(pl.lit("StationA"))
    .otherwise(pl.lit("StationB"))
)
ans = _df.group_by_dynamic(
    index_column="DATE",
    every="10y",  # 10еєігБФгБ®гБЂйЫЖи®И
    group_by="Station",  # гВЂгГЖгВігГ™гВЂгГЂгВ≠гГЉгВТжМЗеЃЪ
).agg(pl.col("TMAX").mean().alias("AvgTMAX/decade"))
print(ans)

fields.problem:
`df_wide`гБѓгАБзФЯеЊТгБФгБ®гБЃеРДзІСзЫЃгБЃзВєжХ∞гВТж®™жМБгБ°гБІдњЭжМБгБЧгБ¶гБДгБЊгБЩгАВгБУгБЃDataFrameгВТгАМзФЯеЊТ(`Student`)гАНгАМзІСзЫЃ(`Subject`)гАНгАМзВєжХ∞(`Score`)гАНгВТеИЧгБЂжМБгБ§зЄ¶йХЈгБЃељҐеЉПгБЂе§ЙжПЫгБЧprintгБІеЗЇеКЫгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБДгАВ
дї•дЄЛгБЃгВ≥гГЉгГЙгВТеЃМжИРгБЧгАБеЃМжИРгБЧгБЯгВ≥гГЉгГЙеЕ®дљУгБЃгБњгВТеЫЮз≠ФгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБДгАВ
```python
import polars as pl
df_wide = pl.DataFrame({
    "Student": ["Alice", "Bob", "Carol"],
    "Math": [90, 88, 92],
    "Science": [85, 91, 89],
})
```
fields.answer_code:
import polars as pl
df_wide = pl.DataFrame({
    "Student": ["Alice", "Bob", "Carol"],
    "Math": [90, 88, 92],
    "Science": [85, 91, 89],
})
ans = df_wide.unpivot(
    on=["Math", "Science"],
    index="Student",
    variable_name="Subject",
    value_name="Score"
)
print(ans)

fields.name: study_polars2_4.1.1
fields.title: еХПй°М 4.1.1 гВ∞гГЂгГЉгГЧеЖЕгБІгБЃгГ©гГ≥гВ≠гГ≥гВ∞
fields.problem:
`df_titanic`гВТжђ°гБЃжЭ°дїґгБІдњЃж≠£гБЧprintгБІеЗЇеКЫгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБДгАВ
* еРДеЃҐеЃ§гВѓгГ©гВє (Pclass) еЖЕгБІгБЃйБЛи≥Г (Fare) гБЃйЩНй†ЖгГ©гГ≥гВ≠гГ≥гВ∞гВТи®ИзЃЧгБЩгВЛ
  * еИЧеРНгВТ`FareRankInClass`гБ®гБЩгВЛ
  * `method="dense"`гВТгБ§гБСгВЛгБУгБ®
* FareRankInClassгАБPclassгАБPassengerIdгБІгВљгГЉгГИгБЩгВЛ
дї•дЄЛгБЃгВ≥гГЉгГЙгВТеЃМжИРгБЧгАБеЃМжИРгБЧгБЯгВ≥гГЉгГЙеЕ®дљУгБЃгБњгВТеЫЮз≠ФгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБДгАВ
```python
import polars as pl
_file = "data/titanic_train.csv"
df_titanic = pl.read_csv(_file)
```
fields.answer_code:
import polars as pl
_file = "data/titanic_train.csv"
df_titanic = pl.read_csv(_file)
ans = df_titanic.with_columns(
    FareRankInClass=pl.col("Fare").rank(
        method="dense", descending=True
    ).over("Pclass")
).sort("FareRankInClass", "Pclass", "PassengerId")
print(ans)

_file = "data/NYC_Central_Park_weather_1869-2022.csv"

import polars as pl

fields.name: study_polars2_4.1.8
fields.title: еХПй°М 4.1.8 жЭ°дїґдїШгБНгВ¶гВ£гГ≥гГЙгВ¶

* еРДеЃҐеЃ§гВѓгГ©гВє (Pclass) еЖЕгБІгАБйБЛи≥ГпЉИFareпЉЙгБМ50дї•дЄКгБЃдєЧеЃҐгБЃгБњгВТеѓЊи±°гБЂгАБйБЛи≥ГгБЃзіѓз©НеТМгВТи®ИзЃЧгБЩгВЛ
  * йБЛи≥ГгБМ50жЬ™жЇАгБЃдєЧеЃҐгБѓйБЛи≥ГгВТ0гБ®гБњгБ™гБЩ
  * еИЧеРНгВТ`ConditionalCumulativeFare`гБ®гБЩгВЛ
дї•дЄЛгБЃгВ≥гГЉгГЙгВТеЃМжИРгБЧгАБеЃМжИРгБЧгБЯгВ≥гГЉгГЙеЕ®дљУгБЃгБњгВТеЫЮз≠ФгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБДгАВ

fields.answer_code:
import polars as pl
_file = "data/titanic_train.csv"
df_titanic = pl.read_csv(_file)
ans = df_titanic.with_columns(
    ConditionalCumulativeFare=pl.when(pl.col("Fare") >= 50)
    .then(pl.col("Fare"))

    .cum_sum()
    .over("Pclass")
)
print(ans)

import polars as pl

fields.problem:
`_df`гВТеЕГгБЂгАБдЄЛи®ШгБЃеЗ¶зРЖгБЃжЬАзµВзµРжЮЬгВТprintгБІеЗЇеКЫгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБДгАВ

1. еИЧ`DATE`гВТdateеЮЛгБЂе§ЙжЫігБЩгВЛ
2. жЬИгБФгБ®гБЂгАБжЧ•жђ°гБЃжЬАйЂШж∞ЧжЄ©(TMAX)гБЃеє≥еЭЗ(MonthlyAvgTMAX)гБ®ж®ЩжЇЦеБПеЈЃ(MonthlyStdTMAX)гВТи®ИзЃЧгБЩгВЛ
3. жЬАйЂШж∞ЧжЄ©гБМгАБгБЭгБЃжЬИгБЃеє≥еЭЗгБЛгВЙж®ЩжЇЦеБПеЈЃгБЃ2еАНдї•дЄКйЫҐгВМгБ¶гБДгВЛжЧ•гВТгАМзХ∞еЄЄжЧ•(IsAnomaly)гАНгБ®гБЩгВЛ
4. зХ∞еЄЄжЧ•гБ†гБСжКљеЗЇгБЧжЧ•дїШй†ЖгБЂгВљгГЉгГИгБЩгВЛ

жЬАеИЭгБЃ3и°МгБМдЄЛи®ШгБЃгВИгБЖгБЂгБ™гВЛгБУгБ®гАВ

| DATE       | PRCP | SNOW | SNWD | TMIN | TMAX | MonthlyAvgTMAX | MonthlyStdTMAX | IsAnomaly |
| :--------- | ---: | ---: | :--- | ---: | ---: | -------------: | -------------: | :-------- |
| 1869-02-13 |  0.0 |  0.0 | null |   40 |   61 |      39.674638 |      10.025825 | true      |
| 1869-03-01 |  0.0 |  0.0 | null |    4 |   26 |      47.824675 |       10.51861 | true      |
| 1869-03-07 |  0.0 |  0.0 | null |   20 |   26 |      47.824675 |       10.51861 | true      |
дї•дЄЛгБЃгВ≥гГЉгГЙгВТеЃМжИРгБЧгАБеЃМжИРгБЧгБЯгВ≥гГЉгГЙеЕ®дљУгБЃгБњгВТеЫЮз≠ФгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБДгАВ

fields.answer_code:
import polars as pl
_file = "data/NYC_Central_Park_weather_1869-2022.csv"
_df = pl.scan_csv(_file)
# 1. еИЧ`DATE`гВТdateеЮЛгБЂе§ЙжЫі
_tmp = _df.with_columns(pl.col("DATE").str.to_date())

# 2. жЬИгБФгБ®гБЃжЬАйЂШж∞ЧжЄ©(TMAX)гБЃеє≥еЭЗгБ®ж®ЩжЇЦеБПеЈЃгБЃи®ИзЃЧ
_tmp = _tmp.with_columns(
    MonthlyAvgTMAX=pl.col("TMAX").mean().over(pl.col("DATE").dt.month()),
    MonthlyStdTMAX=pl.col("TMAX").std().over(pl.col("DATE").dt.month()),
)

# 3. жЬАйЂШж∞ЧжЄ©гБМжЬИеє≥еЭЗгБЛгВЙж®ЩжЇЦеБПеЈЃгБЃ2еАНдї•дЄКгВТзХ∞еЄЄжЧ•
_tmp = _tmp.with_columns(
    IsAnomaly=(pl.col("TMAX") - pl.col("MonthlyAvgTMAX")).abs() > 2 * pl.col("MonthlyStdTMAX"),
)

# 4. зХ∞еЄЄжЧ•гБЃгВТжКљеЗЇгБЧгБ¶гВљгГЉгГИ
print(_tmp.filter(pl.col("IsAnomaly")).sort("DATE").collect())

fields.name: study_polars2_5.4.2
fields.title: еХПй°М 5.4.2 й°ІеЃҐгБЃRFMеИЖжЮР
fields.problem:
`_df`гВТеЕГгБЂгАБеРДй°ІеЃҐгБЂгБ§гБДгБ¶RFMжМЗж®ЩгВТи®ИзЃЧгБЧгАБжЬАзµВзµРжЮЬгВТprintгБІеЗЇеКЫгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБДгАВ

**жЙЛй†Ж**

1. гГЗгГЉгВњгВѓгГ™гГЉгГЛгГ≥гВ∞
  * InvoiceDateгВТdatetimeеЮЛгБЂе§ЙжПЫ(`format="%m/%d/%y %H:%M"`)
  * Quantity > 0гАБUnitPrice > 0гАБCustomerIDгБМжђ†жРНдї•е§ЦгБІгГХгВ£гГЂгВњгГ™гГ≥гВ∞

2. RFMжМЗж®ЩгВТи®ИзЃЧ
  * CustomerIDгБІгВ∞гГЂгГЉгГЧеМЦгБЧдї•дЄЛгВТдњЃж≠£
    * еИЧ`Recency`гБ®гБЧгБ¶гАБгАМгВ∞гГЂгГЉгГЧеМЦеЙНгБЃInvoiceDateгБЃжЬАе§ІеА§гАНгБЛгВЙInvoiceDateгБЃжЬАе§ІеА§гВТеЉХгБДгБЯжЧ•жХ∞+1
    * еИЧ`Frequency`гБ®гБЧгБ¶гАБInvoiceNoгБЃгГ¶гГЛгГЉгВѓжХ∞
    * еИЧ`Monetary`гБ®гБЧгБ¶гАБ(Quantity * UnitPrice)гБЃеРИи®И

3. еИЧ`Monetary`гБІйЩНй†ЖгБЂгАБеИЧ`CustomerID`гБІжШЗй†ЖгБЂгВљгГЉгГИ

жЬАеИЭгБЃ3и°МгБМдЄЛи®ШгБЃгВИгБЖгБЂгБ™гВЛгБУгБ®гАВ

| CustomerID | Recency | Frequency |  Monetary |
| ---------: | ------: | --------: | --------: |
|      14646 |       7 |        29 | 121973.65 |
|      18102 |      12 |        20 | 106601.55 |
|      12346 |     160 |         1 |   77183.6 |
дї•дЄЛгБЃгВ≥гГЉгГЙгВТеЃМжИРгБЧгАБеЃМжИРгБЧгБЯгВ≥гГЉгГЙеЕ®дљУгБЃгБњгВТеЫЮз≠ФгБЧгБ¶гБПгБ†гБХгБДгАВ
```python
import polars as pl
_file = "data/online_retail.parquet"
_df = pl.scan_parquet(_file)
```
fields.answer_code:
import polars as pl
_file = "data/online_retail.parquet"
_df = pl.scan_parquet(_file)
# 1. гГЗгГЉгВњгВѓгГ™гГЉгГЛгГ≥гВ∞
_tmp = _df.with_columns(
    pl.col("InvoiceDate").str.to_datetime(format="%m/%d/%y %H:%M"),
).filter(
    pl.col("Quantity") > 0,
    pl.col("UnitPrice") > 0,
    pl.col("CustomerID").is_not_null(),
)

# 2. RFMжМЗж®ЩгВТи®ИзЃЧ
_tmp = (
    _tmp.with_columns(
        Recency=(
            pl.col("InvoiceDate").max() - pl.col("InvoiceDate").max().over("CustomerID")
        ).dt.total_days() + 1,
    )
    .group_by("CustomerID")
    .agg(
        pl.col("Recency").first(),
        Frequency=pl.col("InvoiceNo").n_unique(),
        Monetary=(pl.col("Quantity") * pl.col("UnitPrice")).sum(),
    )
)

# 3. еИЧ`Monetary`гБІйЩНй†ЖгБЂгАБеИЧ`CustomerID`гБІжШЗй†ЖгБЂгВљгГЉгГИ
print(_tmp.sort(["Monetary", "CustomerID"], descending=[True, False]).collect())

import polars as pl
_file = "data/titanic_train.csv"
df_titanic = pl.read_csv(_file)
df_titanic = df_titanic.with_columns(
    pl.when(pl.col("Age") < 12).then(pl.lit("Child"))
    .when((pl.col("Age") >= 12) & (pl.col("Age") < 60)).then(pl.lit("Adult"))
    .when(pl.col("Age") >= 60).then(pl.lit("Senior"))
    .otherwise(None)
    .alias("AgeCategory")
)
print(df_titanic)

import polars as pl
_file = "data/titanic_train.csv"
df_titanic = pl.read_csv(_file)

df_titanic = df_titanic.with_columns(
    pl.lit(["1st", "2nd", "3rd"]).map_elements(lambda x: "1st" if x == 1 else "2nd" if x == 2 else "3rd", require_eval=False).cast(pl.Categorical).alias("Pclass")
)

# дЄКи®ШгБЃе§ЙжПЫгВТгВИгВКзЫіжО•зЪДгБ™гГЮгГГгГФгГ≥гВ∞гБІи®Шињ∞гБЩгВЛе†іеРИпЉЪ
df_titanic = df_titanic.with_columns(
    pl.when(pl.col("Pclass") == 1).then(pl.lit("1st"))
    .when(pl.col("Pclass") == 2).then(pl.lit("2nd"))
    .otherwise(pl.lit("3rd"))
    .cast(pl.Categorical)
    .alias("Pclass")
)

print(df_titanic.head(3))
```

import polars as pl
_file = "data/titanic_train.csv"
df_titanic = pl.read_csv(_file)

# жХ∞еА§еИЧгБЃжКљеЗЇгБ®еє≥еЭЗи®ИзЃЧпЉИSexгБФгБ®гБЂгВ∞гГЂгГЉгГЧеМЦпЉЙ
numeric_cols = [col for col in df_titanic.columns if df_titanic[col].dtype.is_numeric()]
sex_means = (
    df_titanic.group_by("Sex")
    .agg([
        pl.all().exclude("Sex").mean().name.suffix("_Mean")
    ])
)

# еЕГгБЃгГЗгГЉгВњгГХгГђгГЉгГ†гВТжЫіжЦ∞пЉИи®ИзЃЧгБЧгБЯеє≥еЭЗеА§гВТзµРеРИпЉЙ
# вАїгБУгБЃжІЛжИРгБІгБѓгАМжАІеИ•гБФгБ®гБЃеє≥еЭЗеА§гАНгВТжЦ∞гБЧгБДеИЧгБ®гБЧгБ¶ињљеК†гБЩгВЛељҐгБЂгБ™гВКгБЊгБЩгАВ
df_titanic = df_titanic.join(sex_means, on="Sex", how="left")

# жЬАзµВзЪДгБ™гВљгГЉгГИгБ®еЗЇеКЫ
result = df_titanic.sort("Sex")
print(result)
```

import polars as pl
_file = "data/NYC_Central_Park_weather_1869-2022.csv"
df_weather = pl.read_csv(_file).with_columns(pl.col("DATE").str.to_date())

df_weather = df_weather.with_columns(
    ((pl.col("DATE").dt.year() - 1) * 12 + pl.col("DATE").dt.month()).alias("year_month_index")
).with_columns(
    (pl.col("SNOW").sum().over(pl.col("year_month_index").map_elements(lambda x: (x // 12) * 12 + (x % 12 + 7)))), # гБУгБЃгГ≠гВЄгГГгВѓгБІгБѓгБ™гБПгАБеНШзіФгБ™еєіеЇ¶и®ИзЃЧгБІгВ∞гГЂгГЉгГЧеМЦ
    pl.col("SNOW").sum().over(pl.col("DATE").dt.year().map_elements(lambda y: (y - 1) * 12 + 6)).alias("TotalSnow") # и™§гВКдњЃж≠£
)

# ж≠£иІ£гБЃгГ≠гВЄгГГгВѓ: 7жЬИгВТиµЈзВєгБ®гБЩгВЛеєіеЇ¶гВТи®ИзЃЧгБЧгАБгБЭгБЃеєіеЇ¶гБФгБ®гБЂSNOWгВТеРИи®ИгБЩгВЛ
df_weather = df_weather.with_columns(
    (((pl.col("DATE").dt.year() - 1) * 12 + pl.col("DATE").dt.month()) // 12).alias("year_group")
).with_columns(
    pl.col("SNOW").sum().over(pl.col("year_group")).alias("TotalSnow")
)

print(df_weather)

import polars as pl
_file = "data/NYC_Central_Park_weather_1869-2022.csv"
df_weather = pl.read_csv(_file).with_columns(pl.col("DATE").str.to_date())

# 7жЬИгВТйЦЛеІЛзВєгБ®гБЩгВЛеєіеЇ¶пЉИSeasonпЉЙгВТеЃЪзЊ©
df_weather = df_weather.with_columns(
    pl.when(pl.col("DATE").dt.month() >= 7)
    .then(pl.col("DATE").dt.year() + 1)
    .otherwise(pl.col("DATE").dt.year())
    .alias("Season")
)

# SeasonгБФгБ®гБЂSNOWгБЃеРИи®ИгВТи®ИзЃЧгБЧгАБеЕГгБЃгГЗгГЉгВњгГХгГђгГЉгГ†гБЂзµРеРИ
df_weather = df_weather.with_columns(
    pl.col("SNOW").sum().over("Season").alias("TotalSnow")
).drop("Season")

print(df_weather)

).with_columns(
    (pl.col("Year") + (pl.col("Month") < 7).cast(pl.Int32)).alias("FiscalYear")
).group_by("FiscalYear").agg(
    pl.col("SNOW").sum().alias("TotalSnow")
).sort("FiscalYear")

print(df_weather)

# еЬ∞зВє(Station)гБФгБ®гАБгБЛгБ§10еєігБФгБ®гБЂеє≥еЭЗжЬАйЂШж∞ЧжЄ©пЉИTMAXгБЃеє≥еЭЗпЉЙгВТи®ИзЃЧгБЩгВЛ
_df = _df.with_columns(
    Decade=(pl.col("DATE").dt.year() // 10 * 10)
).group_by(["Station", "Decade"]).agg(
    pl.col("TMAX").mean().alias("AvgTMAX/decade")
)

print(_df)
```

import polars as pl
# гГАгГЯгГЉгБЃи¶≥жЄђеЬ∞зВєеИЧгВТињљеК†

)

).group_by(["Station", "decade"]).agg(

)

import polars as pl
_file = "data/NYC_Central_Park_weather_1869-2022.csv"
df_weather = pl.read_csv(_file).with_columns(pl.col("DATE").str.to_date())
_df = df_weather.group_by_dynamic(
    index_column="DATE", every="2d"
).agg(AvgTMAX=pl.col("TMAX").mean())[:3]

_df = _df.set_sorted("DATE")
_df = _df.rolling_by(
    index_column="DATE",
    period="2d",
    closed="both",
).agg(pl.col("AvgTMAX").mean())

_df = _df.with_columns(
    pl.col("DATE").dt.date()
)

print(_df)

import polars as pl
from datetime import date

market_prices = pl.DataFrame({
    'time': pl.date_range(pl.date(2023, 1, 2), pl.date(2023, 1, 8), '2d', eager=True),
    'price': range(2, 9, 2),
})

orders = pl.DataFrame({
    'order_time': [date(2023, 1, 1), date(2023, 1, 5), date(2023, 1, 9)],
    'volume': [100, 120, 180],
})

result = orders.join(
    market_prices,
    left_on="order_time",
    right_on="time",
    how="left"
).sort("time").upsample(time_column="time", every="1d").interpolate(method="linear") # This is a placeholder logic for complex join. 

# Correct implementation using join_asof:
result = pl.join_asof(
    orders.sort("order_time"),
    market_prices.sort("time"),
    left_on="order_time",
    right_on="time"
)

print(result)
```

import polars as pl
from datetime import date

market_prices = pl.DataFrame({
    'time': pl.date_range(pl.date(2023, 1, 2), pl.date(2023, 1, 8), '2d', eager=True),
    'price': range(2, 10, 2),
})
orders = pl.DataFrame({
    'order_time': [date(2023, 1, 1), date(2023, 1, 5), date(2023, 1, 9)],
    'volume': [100, 120, 180],
})

result = orders.join_asof(
    market_prices,
    left_on="order_time",
    right_on="time",
    strategy="backward"
)
print(result)

)

import polars as pl
_file = "data/NYC_Central_Park_weather_1869-2022.csv"
df_weather = pl.read_csv(_file).with_columns(
    pl.col("DATE").str.to_date()
)
df_weather = df_weather.with_columns(
    pl.col("PRCP").cum_sum().over("DATE").alias("CumulativePRCP")
)
# Note: Since the requirement asks to calculate cumulative sum per year, 
# but "DATE" is a date type, we group by the year component of DATE.
df_weather = df_weather.with_columns(
    pl.col("PRCP").cum_sum().over(pl.col("DATE").dt.year()).alias("CumulativePRCP")
)
print(df_weather)

df_weather = pl.read_csv(_file).with_columns(pl.col("DATE").str.to_date())

    .with_columns(

    )

)

import polars as pl

df_json = pl.DataFrame(
    {
        "OrderID": [101, 102, 103],
        "ItemJson": [
            '{"name": "Laptop", "price": 1200}',
            '{"name": "Mouse", "price": 25}',
            '{"name": "Keyboard", "price": 75}',
        ],
    }
)
dtype = pl.Struct([
    pl.Field("name", pl.String),
    pl.Field("price", pl.Int64),
])

df_json = df_json.with_columns(
    pl.col("ItemJson").str.json_decode().cast(dtype).alias("ItemStruct")
).drop("ItemJson")

print(df_json.head(10))
```

import polars as pl
_df = pl.DataFrame({"A": [1, 2, 3], "B": [4, 5, 6]})
def _value(row: tuple[int, int]) -> int:
    return row[0] + 2 * row[1]

_df = _df.map_elements(lambda row: _value(row), as_ref=True).select(pl.all().name.suffix("").alias("Val"))
# Or more accurately to the logic requested (applying function and selecting only that result):
_df = pl.DataFrame(
    _df.map_elements(lambda row: _value(row), as_ref=True).select(pl.all().alias("Val"))
)
print(_df)
```

*Note: Based on the logic of "applying value to each row" and "only keeping that column", here is the precise implementation:*

```python
import polars as pl
_df = pl.DataFrame({"A": [1, 2, 3], "B": [4, 5, 6]})
def _value(row: tuple[int, int]) -> int:
    return row[0] + 2 * row[1]

_df = _df.map_elements(lambda x: _value(x), as_ref=True).select(pl.all().name.suffix("").alias("Val"))
print(_df)
```

import polars as pl
_df = pl.DataFrame({"A": [1, 2, 3], "B": [4, 5, 6]})

import polars as pl
import numpy as np
_lf = pl.LazyFrame({"Name": ["Alice", "Bob", "Carol"], "Score": [40, 32, 48]})
def double_df(df: pl.DataFrame)->pl.DataFrame:
    return df.select(pl.col("Score") * 2)

print(double_df(_lf.collect()))
```

import polars as pl
_file = "data/titanic_train.csv"
df_titanic = pl.read_csv(_file)
ctx = pl.SQLContext()
ctx.register("titanic", df_titanic)
_query = """
SELECT Name, Age, Pclass
FROM titanic
WHERE Age >= 30 AND Sex = 'male'
ORDER BY Pclass
"""
df_result = ctx.execute(_query).collect()

import polars as pl
_file = "data/NYC_Central_Park_weather_1869-2022.csv"
_df = pl.scan_csv(_file)

result = (
    _df
    .with_columns(pl.col("DATE").str.to_date())
    .with_columns([
        pl.col("TMAX").mean().over(pl.col("DATE").dt.truncate("1mo")).alias("MonthlyAvgTMAX"),
        pl.col("TMAX").std().over(pl.col("DATE").dt.truncate("1mo")).alias("MonthlyStdTMAX"),
    ])
    .with_columns(
        ((pl.col("TMAX") - pl.col("MonthlyAvgTMAX")).abs() >= (2 * pl.col("MonthlyStdTMAX")))
        .alias("IsAnomaly")
    )
    .filter(pl.col("IsAnomaly"))
    .sort("DATE")
    .collect()
)

print(result)

```python
import polars as pl
_file = "data/NYC_Central_Park_weather_1869-2022.csv"
_df = pl.scan_csv(_file)

result = (
    _df
    .with_columns(pl.col("DATE").str.to_date())
    .with_columns([
        pl.col("TMAX").mean().over("DATE").alias("MonthlyAvgTMAX"), # еЃЯйЪЫгБЂгБѓжЬИгБІгВ∞гГЂгГЉгГЧеМЦгБМењЕи¶Б
    ])
    # жЬИгБФгБ®гБЃзµ±и®ИйЗПгВТи®ИзЃЧгБЧгБ¶зµРеРИ
    .with_columns(
        pl.col("DATE").dt.month().alias("month"),
        pl.col("DATE").dt.year().alias("year"),
    )
    .with_columns([
        pl.col("TMAX").mean().over(["year", "month"]).alias("MonthlyAvgTMAX"),
        pl.col("TMAX").std().over(["year", "month"]).alias("MonthlyStdTMAX"),
    ])
    .with_columns(
        (pl.col("TMAX") - pl.col("MonthlyAvgTMAX")).abs() >= (pl.col("MonthlyStdTMAX") * 2)
    ).with_columns(
        pl.col("DATE").alias("IsAnomaly") # гБУгБУгБІдї£еЕ•гБЧзЫігБЩгБЃгБІгБѓгБ™гБПгАБеИЧеРНгВТжМЗеЃЪ
    )
)

# дЄКи®ШгБЃгГ≠гВЄгГГгВѓгВТжХізРЖгБЧгБ¶ж≠£гБЧгБПеЃЯи£Е
result = (
    _df
    .with_columns(pl.col("DATE").str.to_date())
    .with_columns([
        pl.col("TMAX").mean().over([pl.col("DATE").dt.year(), pl.col("DATE").dt.month()]).alias("MonthlyAvgTMAX"),
        pl.col("TMAX").std().over([pl.col("DATE").dt.year(), pl.col("DATE").dt.month()]).alias("MonthlyStdTMAX"),
    ])
    .with_columns(
        ((pl.col("TMAX") - pl.col("MonthlyAvgTMAX")).abs() >= (pl.col("MonthlyStdTMAX") * 2)).alias("IsAnomaly")
    )
    .filter(pl.col("IsAnomaly"))
    .sort("DATE")
    .collect()
)

print(result)
```

import polars as pl
_file = "data/NYC_Central_Park_weather_1869-2022.csv"
_df = pl.scan_csv(_file)

result = (
    _df
    .with_columns(
        pl.col("DATE").str.to_date("%Y-%m-%d")
    )
    .with_columns(
        pl.col("DATE").dt.month().alias("month")
    )
    .group_by("month")
    .agg(
        pl.col("TMAX").mean().alias("MonthlyAvgTMAX"),
        pl.col("TMAX").std().alias("MonthlyStdTMAX")
    )
    .join(
        _df.with_columns(pl.col("DATE").dt.month().alias("month")),
        on="month",
        how="left"
    )
    .with_columns(
        (
            (pl.col("TMAX") - pl.col("MonthlyAvgTMAX")).abs() 
            >= (2 * pl.col("MonthlyStdTMAX"))
        ).alias("IsAnomaly")
    )
    .filter(pl.col("IsAnomaly"))
    .select(
        "DATE", "PRCP", "SNOW", "SNWD", "TMIN", "TMAX", 
        "MonthlyAvgTMAX", "MonthlyStdTMAX", "IsAnomaly"
    )
    .sort("DATE")
    .collect()
)

print(result)

```python
import polars as pl
from datetime import datetime

_file = "data/online_retail.parquet"
_df = pl.scan_parquet(_file)

result = _df.filter(
    (pl.col("Quantity") > 0) & 
    (pl.col("UnitPrice") > 0) & 
    (pl.col("CustomerID").is_not_null())
).with_columns(
    pl.col("InvoiceDate").str.to_datetime(format="%m/%d/%y %H:%M")
).collect()

max_date = result["InvoiceDate"].max()

rfm = result.group_by("CustomerID").agg(
    (max_date - pl.col("InvoiceDate").max()).dt.total_days() + 1.0,
    pl.col("InvoiceNo").n_unique(),
    (pl.col("Quantity") * pl.col("UnitPrice")).sum()
).select(
    pl.col("CustomerID"),
    pl.col("InvoiceDate").map_elements(lambda x: (max_date - x).dt.total_days() + 1).alias("Recency"), # This logic was simplified in the final select for clarity
    pl.col("InvoiceNo").n_unique().alias("Frequency"),
    (pl.col("Quantity") * pl.col("UnitPrice")).sum().alias("Monetary")
)

# Re-calculating correctly based on requested logic to ensure exact types and columns
rfm = result.group_by("CustomerID").agg(
    ((max_date - pl.col("InvoiceDate").max()).dt.total_days() + 1).cast(pl.Float64).alias("Recency"),
    pl.col("InvoiceNo").n_unique().cast(pl.Int64).alias("Frequency"),
    (pl.col("Quantity") * pl.col("UnitPrice")).sum().cast(pl.Float64).alias("Monetary")
).sort(
    ["Monetary", "CustomerID"], 
    by=["Monetary", "CustomerID"]
)

print(rfm.head(3))
```

вАїж≥®жДПпЉЪжПРдЊЫгБХгВМгБЯи¶БдїґгВТж≠£зҐЇгБЂеПНжШ†гБЩгВЛгБЯгВБгАБеЮЛе§ЙжПЫгБ®гВљгГЉгГИгВТеО≥еѓЖгБЂи°МгБЖгВ≥гГЉгГЙгБІгБЩгАВеЃЯйЪЫгБЃгГЗгГЉгВњжІЛйА†гБЂгВИгВК`Recency`гБЃи®ИзЃЧйГ®еИЖгБМеЛХзЪДгБЂи™њжХігБХгВМгВЛе†іеРИгБМгБВгВКгБЊгБЩгАВ

import polars as pl

_file = "data/online_retail.parquet"
_df = pl.scan_parquet(_file)

df = _df.with_columns(
    pl.col("InvoiceDate").str.to_datetime(format="%m/%d/%y %H:%M")
).filter(
    (pl.col("Quantity") > 0) & 
    (pl.col("UnitPrice") > 0) & 
    (pl.col("CustomerID").is_not_null())
).collect()

rfm = df.group_by("CustomerID").agg(
    (pl.col("InvoiceDate").max().dt.total_days() - pl.col("InvoiceDate").max().dt.total_days() + 1).alias("Recency"), # ж≥®: и¶БдїґгБЃгАМжЬАе§ІеА§гБЛгВЙжЬАе§ІеА§гВТеЉХгБПгАНгБЂеЯЇгБ•гБНи®ИзЃЧ
    # и¶БдїґгБЃгАМгВ∞гГЂгГЉгГЧеМЦеЙНгБЃInvoiceDateгБЃжЬАе§ІеА§гАНгВТеЕ®дљУгБЛгВЙеПЦеЊЧгБЧгБ¶и®ИзЃЧгБЩгВЛе†іеРИ
    (pl.col("InvoiceDate").max().dt.total_days() - df["InvoiceDate"].max().dt.total_days() + 1).alias("Recency"),
    pl.col("InvoiceNo").n_unique().alias("Frequency"),
    (pl.col("Quantity") * pl.col("UnitPrice")).sum().alias("Monetary")
)

# ж≠£гБЧгБДRecencyи®ИзЃЧпЉИеЕ®дљУгБЃжЬАе§ІжЧ• - еРДй°ІеЃҐгБЃжЬАе§ІжЧ• + 1пЉЙ
max_date = df["InvoiceDate"].max()
rfm = df.group_by("CustomerID").agg(
    ((max_date - pl.col("InvoiceDate").max()).dt.total_days() + 1).alias("Recency"),
    pl.col("InvoiceNo").n_unique().alias("Frequency"),
    (pl.col("Quantity") * pl.col("UnitPrice")).sum().alias("Monetary")
).sort(["Monetary", "CustomerID"], descending=[True, False])

print(rfm.head(3))

df_weather = (

import polars as pl
_file = "data/NYC_Central_Park_weather_1869-2022.csv"
df_weather = pl.read_csv(_file).with_columns(pl.col("DATE").str.to_date())
# гГАгГЯгГЉгБЃи¶≥жЄђеЬ∞зВєеИЧгВТињљеК†
_df = df_weather.with_columns(
    Station=pl.when(pl.col("DATE").dt.year() < 1950)
    .then(pl.lit("StationA"))
    .otherwise(pl.lit("StationB"))
)

# еЬ∞зВєгБФгБ®гАБ10еєігБФгБ®гБЂеє≥еЭЗжЬАйЂШж∞ЧжЄ©гВТи®ИзЃЧ
result = (
    _df.with_columns(
        DATE=(pl.col("DATE").dt.year() // 10 * 10)
    )
    .group_by(["Station", "DATE"])
    .agg(
        pl.col("TMAX").mean().alias("AvgTMAX/decade")
    )
    .select(["Station", "DATE", "AvgTMAX/decade"])
    .sort(["Station", "DATE"])
)

print(result)

from datetime import date
import polars as pl

market_prices = pl.DataFrame({
    'time': pl.date_range(pl.date(2023, 1, 2), pl.date(2023, 1, 8), '2d', eager=True),
    'price': range(2, 9, 2),
})
orders = pl.DataFrame({
    'order_time': [date(2023, 1, 1), date(2023, 1, 5), date(2023, 1, 9)],
    'volume': [100, 120, 180],
})

result = orders.join_asof(
    market_prices,
    left_on='order_time',
    right_on='time',
    strategy='backward'
)
print(result)

_file = "data/titanic_train.csv"
df_titanic = pl.read_csv(_file)
ctx = pl.SQLContext()
ctx.register("titanic", df_titanic)
_query = """
SELECT Name, Age, Pclass
FROM titanic
WHERE Age >= 30 AND Sex = 'male'
ORDER BY Pclass
"""
df_result = ctx.execute(_query).collect()
print(df_result)

import polars as pl
_file = "data/NYC_Central_Park_weather_1869-2022.csv"
_df = pl.scan_csv(_file)

df = (
    _df.with_columns(pl.col("DATE").str.to_date())
    .with_columns([
        pl.col("TMAX").mean().over(pl.col("DATE").dt.month()).alias("MonthlyAvgTMAX"),
        pl.col("TMAX").std().over(pl.col("DATE").dt.month()).alias("MonthlyStdTMAX"),
    ])
    .with_columns(
        ((pl.col("TMAX") - pl.col("MonthlyAvgTMAX")).abs() >= 2 * pl.col("MonthlyStdTMAX")).alias("IsAnomaly")
    )
    .filter(pl.col("IsAnomaly"))
    .sort("DATE")
    .collect()
)
print(df)
```

import polars as pl

_file = "data/online_retail.parquet"
_df = pl.scan_parquet(_file)

# 1. гГЗгГЉгВњгВѓгГ™гГЉгГЛгГ≥гВ∞
cleaned_df = _df.with_columns(
    pl.col("InvoiceDate").str.strptime(pl.Datetime, format="%m/%d/%y %H:%M")
).filter(
    (pl.col("Quantity") > 0) &
    (pl.col("UnitPrice") > 0) &
    (pl.col("CustomerID").is_not_null())
).collect()

# гВ∞гГЂгГЉгГЧеМЦеЙНгБЃInvoiceDateгБЃжЬАе§ІеА§гВТеПЦеЊЧ
max_date = cleaned_df["InvoiceDate"].max()

# 2. RFMжМЗж®ЩгВТи®ИзЃЧ & 3. гВљгГЉгГИ
rfm_df = (
    cleaned_df.group_by("CustomerID")
    .agg(
        ((pl.lit(max_date) - pl.col("InvoiceDate").max()).dt.total_days() + 1).alias("Recency"),
        pl.col("InvoiceNo").n_unique().alias("Frequency"),
        (pl.col("Quantity") * pl.col("UnitPrice")).sum().alias("Monetary")
    )
    .sort(["Monetary", "CustomerID"], descending=[True, False])
)

print(rfm_df)
